items.title: OpenNMT/CTranslate2
items.summary: Fast inference engine for Transformer models CTranslate2 CTranslate2 is a C++ and Python library for efficient inference with Transformer models. The project implements a custom runtime that applies many performance optimization techniques such as weights quantization, layers fusion, batch reordering, etc., to accelerate and reduce the memory usage of Transformer models on CPU and GPU. The following model types are currently supported: Encoder-decoder models: Transformer base/big, M2M-100, NLLB…

items.summary: Triton Inference Server The Triton Inference Server provides a cloud inferencing solution optimized for both CPUs and GPUs. The server provides an inference service via an HTTP or GRPC endpoint, allowing remote clients to request inferencing for any model being managed by the server. For edge deployments, Triton Server is also available as a shared library with an API that allows the full functionality of the server to be included directly in an application.
